title: Telegram assistant emits duplicate and contradictory capture acknowledgements

rootCause.defect1: The CaptureRoute=true fallback drives two reply sinks: (A) NewBotCaptureFn -> Bot.handleTextCapture persists AND replies (replyWithMapping '. Saved …' / captureErrorReply '? Failed to save …'); (B) the renderer sends resp.Body 'saved as an idea — i'll surface it later.'. Two messages per turn.
rootCause.defect2: For a bare '/ask', StripShortcutPrefix('/ask') == '' so sink A's callCapture fails ('? Failed to save') while sink B still claims 'saved as an idea' — a false, contradictory pair; the renderer asserted the idea was saved even when it was not.

resolution: Silence the bot-side capture hook on the assistant path and make it report persistence honestly. CaptureFn now returns error; NewBotCaptureFn delegates to Bot.captureIdeaSilent (persist via shared persistTextIdea, NO reply; empty text -> assistant_adapter.ErrNothingToCapture; errDuplicate -> nil benign success). HandleUpdate inspects the returned error and, on failure, replaces the 'saved as an idea' response with an honest single line via honestCaptureFallbackFailure (nothing-to-save prompt vs generic failure), rendered through the default StatusAnswered body path (single message). The legacy plain-text handleTextCapture keeps its own '. Saved …' reply (BS-001 UX preserved). Four adversarial regression tests added; all GREEN; go test ./... (compile+vet, filtered) clean; both changed packages ok.
codeVsDeployment: deployed. The fix (sourceSha 777323fa) is built, operator-cosign-signed, deployed, and running on the self-hosted home-lab host. Running container digests match the fix build (core sha256:7bd984a316e3feec…, ml sha256:7029c246e24446…), both healthy, and the Telegram assistant adapter is wired and bound. Only the operator's behavioral Telegram smoke test remains (a human turn).

deployment.runningVerification: docker inspect (read-only, safe projection): smackerel-home-lab-smackerel-core-1 running/healthy digest MATCHES CORE FIX; smackerel-home-lab-smackerel-ml-1 running/healthy digest MATCHES ML FIX; core startup log shows 'telegram bot started' + 'assistant Telegram adapter wired and bound to bot'
deployment.operatorSmokeTestPending: send /ask <question> (expect one ack) and bare /ask (expect one honest line, never '? Failed to save' + 'saved as an idea')

affectedSurface: internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/adapter.go (CaptureFn signature, ErrNothingToCapture, HandleUpdate error handling, honestCaptureFallbackFailure)

scopes.title: Single, silent acknowledgement on the capture-as-fallback path
Honest acknowledgement when nothing was saved

followUps: WEATHER-LOCATION (owner bubbles.plan): /weather <us-zip> (US ZIP) does not resolve in the open-meteo geocoder; and BS-006 rewrites a weather provider/geocode error to the generic capture-as-fallback ('saved as an idea') — whether an external-lookup error should instead surface an honest 'weather unavailable' line is a ratified-spec (BS-006) design question. Separate packet.

STATUS-VERSION (owner bubbles.plan): the health endpoint returns version/commit_hash but gates them behind authentication; surfacing them in the Telegram /status command answers the operator's 'what version is installed?' question. Separate observability change.
